postToolUse.bash: bash -lc 'command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; mapfile -t files < <({ git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go"; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.go"; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "*.go"; } | awk "NF" | sort -u); [[ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]] && exit 0; golangci-lint run --fix "${files[@]}"'
